mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_detail (article_id, version, content, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, 1, #{content}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE article_detail SET content = #{content}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT content FROM article_detail WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
